title: Giant Cherry Blossom Bonsai Tree
description: Adds a giant Giant Cherry Blossom Bonsai Tree to the cherry grove biome
body:
### Giant Cherry Blossom Bonsai Tree

**This simple mod adds a giant Giant Cherry Blossom Bonsai Tree to the cherry grove biome**
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/931ff240d7017acc5712ae55c8e0750bff505048.jpeg)


 

- The terrain around the bonsai tree is designed to blend naturally with the cherry grove biome.
- Perfect spot to build a base nearby

![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0445cecbffe9970f3c9ef00ac391e60424bd3433.jpeg)



Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
